title: Kodak's new point-and-shoot 35mm film camera comes in 7 vibrant colors, costs just $35, and brings back one of my favorite pieces of camera design
summary: A new Kodak film point-and-shoot camera has just been announced. The Kodak EC35 is a 35mm film camera made by Reto Project, a company that licenses the Kodak name to produce a range of both analog and digital cameras.
caption: output/2026-07-17/kodak-s-new-point-and-shoot-35mm-film-camera-comes-in-7-vibrant-colors.txt
